title: Silky's Default PvP
description: A Resource Pack focused to tweak PvP experience while keeping the Textures Default
body:
# **Silky's Default PvP**

### ⚔️ The Clean PvP Upgrade You’ve Been Looking For
**Silky's Default PvP is a carefully crafted resource pack designed to enhance your PvP and SMP gameplay experience without drifting away from vanilla aesthetics.**
**No unnecessary clutter. No dramatic texture overhauls.
Just smart, competitive tweaks that give you the clean experience.**


### 🔥 What’s Included?
**This pack combines multiple PvP essentials that are usually scattered across different resource packs:**
- 🔥 Low Fire
- 🛡️ Low Shield/Side Shield (both versions are available in versions tab)
- 🧰 Smaller Utilities
- ✨ Decreased Particles
- 🍗 No Eating Particles
- 🏹 Bow & Crossbow Indicator
- ⚙️ And many more subtle tweaks!


### 🎯 Why Use This Pack?
**If your resource pack list looks like a tower of tiny PvP tweaks stacked on top of each other…**
**You can finally simplify.**
**Silky's Default PvP bundles everything you need into one optimized, clean package built specifically for competitive play.**


## Resource Pack Showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/V60TG7fZAK0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## 🚨 Support 
**Found any bug in the resource pack, or want to suggest any feature to be added to the resource pack?**

- Join my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/uczvEgWfsK) and report the issue there (mention me so I can see it quickly)
- Or **DM me directly on Discord.** My Discord Username: sillyapr1l
